name: Conditional Access Policy Violation
description: Responds to conditional access policy violations such as access from non-compliant devices, untrusted locations, or missing MFA. Analyzes the violation context with AI, enforces compliance by blocking access or requiring step-up authentication, notifies the user of the violation, and alerts the security team for persistent violators.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Graph
required_integrations.reason: Enforce conditional access policies and block non-compliant access

data.title: Conditional Access Violation Alert
data.summary: Fires on conditional access or policy violation detection

data.title: AI Violation Analysis
data.summary: Analyze the violation context, device compliance state, and user risk

data.title: Repeat Violator?
data.summary: Branch if the user has multiple recent conditional access violations

data.title: Block User Access
data.summary: Temporarily block user access until compliance is restored

params.reason: Repeated conditional access policy violations — access blocked pending compliance

data.title: Notify User of Block
data.summary: Inform the user their access is blocked due to repeated violations

config.email_subject: Access Blocked: Conditional Access Policy Violations
config.message: Your access has been temporarily blocked due to repeated conditional access policy violations ({{$.trigger.alert.violation_count_30d}} in 30 days). Violation: {{$.trigger.alert.violation_type}}. Please contact IT to resolve device compliance and restore access.

data.title: Alert Security Team
data.summary: Notify security team of persistent policy violator

config.message: Persistent conditional access violator: {{$.trigger.alert.target_user_email}}. {{$.trigger.alert.violation_count_30d}} violations in 30 days. Access blocked. Latest violation: {{$.trigger.alert.violation_type}}.

data.title: Notify User of Violation
data.summary: Send the user a warning about their policy violation

config.message: A conditional access policy violation was detected: {{$.trigger.alert.violation_type}}. Please ensure your device is compliant and you are connecting from an approved location. Repeated violations will result in access being blocked.

config.summary: Conditional access policy violation response completed
